package.name: Uppercut
package.description: A simplified, SketchUp-style interface for FreeCAD: one workbench with one toolbar (Select, Line, Rectangle, Push/Pull, Move/Rotate, Eraser, Tape Measure, Paint Bucket, views, Add Location, Instructor), assembled from the SketchLayer, PushPull, SiteContext and Migration Guide companion addons plus its own glue tools. Missing companions degrade gracefully: their buttons are omitted and the menu says what to install.
